fact: Aghori Media House (Mumbai digital marketing agency) posted on their LinkedIn profile: 'Grateful and honored to have served as Creative Director for IIFA 2024.' IIFA 2024 is independently confirmed as having taken place September 27–29, 2024 at Yas Island, Abu Dhabi.

From providing Social Media Marketing services for more than half a decade, we are taking a giant leap to provide complete IT solutions. — verbatim from Aghori Media House Pvt. Ltd. (weaghori) LinkedIn company page (https://in.linkedin.com/company/weaghori), retrieved June 2026.

"Aghori" is not just a service-provider, we are a bunch of intuitive minds set free to wander in any direction and grasp and accumulate the best. (Source: Aghori Media House Pvt. Ltd. LinkedIn page — https://in.linkedin.com/company/weaghori, retrieved June 16, 2026)
Rated 4.7 based on 60 Customer Reviews and Ratings (JustDial listing for Aghor/Aghori Media House Pvt Ltd, Malad West, Mumbai — verified live on JustDial as of June 2026)
